ad_creative.headline: PENILAIAN AI PERCUMA (Bernilai RM500!)
ad_creative.body: Chatbot jimat 20+ jam/minggu. Tengok kalau bisnes anda ready dalam 5 soalan.
mandatory_elements: Local examples: Hartamas Real Estate, WITO Technology

z_image_prompts.prompt: Malaysian SME owner filling lead form, chatbot interface visible, WhatsApp icon, text overlay in BM: PENILAIAN AI PERCUMA (Bernilai RM500!)
Infographic style, Malaysian flag colors, chatbot icon, feature highlights in BM, dark blue gradient background

production_table.content: Chatbot jimat 20+ jam/minggu. Tengok kalau bisnes anda ready dalam 5 soalan.
production_table.visual: Chatbot interface animation, WhatsApp chat bubbles
WhatsApp number glowing, Malaysian flag overlay

audience_targeting.retargeting: Page engagers, Video viewers (50%+), TOFU visitors

cost_saving_strategies: Kill ads with CTR < 1% (TOFU) / CPL > RM20 (MOFU) / CPA > RM50 (BOFU) within 48h
Test 3-5 ad variations per funnel stage
Reuse TOFU video for MOFU/BOFU (just change text overlay)
Batch-create 5-10 variations in one session (reduce design time by 70%)
success_metrics: CPL < RM15, CTR > 2%, Lead form completion > 10%
